# harvester_schedule_backup (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "harvester_schedule_backup" "example" {
  name      = "my-backup-schedule"
  namespace = "default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Optional

- `namespace` (String)

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the backup schedule is enabled (default: true). When false, the schedule is suspended.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `message` (String)
- `retain` (Number) Number of backups to retain. Minimum: 1, Default: 5
- `schedule` (String) Cron schedule for the backup in UTC timezone (e.g., '0 0 * * *' for daily at midnight UTC).
- `state` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `vm_name` (String) The name of the virtual machine to backup. Format: 'namespace/name' or 'name' (if in default namespace).
- `volume_name` (String, Deprecated)
